meta.title: Celebrating Global Philanthropy
meta.description: Philanthropy and international development leaders discuss the 2016 Index of Global Philanthropy and Remittances, with Hudson Institute’s Center for Global Prosperity and Indiana University Lilly Family School of Philanthropy, Kenneth R. Weinstein, Amir Pasic, Carol Adelman, Todd Young, Una Osili, Doug Rutzen, David Schwartz, and Dennis Whittle.
